mean_cn: n.星系；银河系；一群显赫的人物
mean_en: any of the large systems of stars, etc. in outer space; the system of stars that contains our sun and its planets, seen as a bright band in the night sky; a group of famous people, or people with a particular skill
sentence: There are countless stars and planets in this beautiful galaxy.
sentence_trans: 在这个美丽的星系里有数不清的恒星和行星。
word_etyma: gala=milk牛奶 → the Milky Way银河系 → 星系
